set.body: Four scripts: benchmark-svd-factor.R, benchmark-svd-backends.R, benchmark-mlx-native-rsvd.R, benchmark-spectral.R. Ops: svd, rsvd, svd_factor_subspace, spectral (eigendecomposition). svd-backends already has a rel_sv_err pattern <e2><80><94> harvest and move it into the shared accuracy helper (amatrix-teo). mlx-native-rsvd must prime MLX before timing (blocked by amatrix-fjo). Add baseline rows for all emitted cells.
set.title: Rehabilitate SVD benchmarks into harness (svd-factor, svd-backends, mlx-native-rsvd, spectral)
